policies.using:
(tenant_id = COALESCE((NULLIF((auth.jwt() ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid, (NULLIF(((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata'::text) ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid,
CASE
    WHEN (auth.role() = 'anon'::text) THEN '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid
    ELSE NULL::uuid
END))

policies.withCheck:
((tenant_id = COALESCE((NULLIF((auth.jwt() ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid, (NULLIF(((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata'::text) ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM line_items li
  WHERE ((li.id = results.line_item_id) AND (li.tenant_id = COALESCE((NULLIF((auth.jwt() ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid, (NULLIF(((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata'::text) ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid))))) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM people p
  WHERE ((p.id = results.person_id) AND (p.tenant_id = COALESCE((NULLIF((auth.jwt() ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid, (NULLIF(((auth.jwt() -> 'app_metadata'::text) ->> 'tenant_id'::text), ''::text))::uuid))))))
